g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Valkyrja CLI entry point')
sendPrompt('What happens during App::start in Valkyrja CLI?')
sendPrompt('How does the Valkyrja CLI data cache work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Valkyrja CLI data cache class contain?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja iterate providers to build the command map?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja build an Input from argv?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about InputReceived middleware in Valkyrja CLI')
sendPrompt('How does command matching work in Valkyrja CLI?')
sendPrompt('What happens when no CLI command is matched in Valkyrja?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RouteNotMatched middleware in Valkyrja CLI')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RouteMatched middleware in Valkyrja CLI')
sendPrompt('How does the Valkyrja Dispatcher invoke CLI command handlers?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RouteDispatched middleware in Valkyrja CLI')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ThrowableCaught middleware in Valkyrja CLI')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja CLI write output to stdout?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Exited middleware in Valkyrja CLI')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja CLI exit with an exit code?')
